# 7 Reasons Why Razorpay payment is Right for Your Business

[August 13, 2019](https://razorpay.com/blog/best-payment-gateway-india/)3 Mins Read

[![Image 2: best payment gateway india](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/best-payment-gateway-india.webp)](https://blog.razorpay.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/best-payment-gateway-india.webp)

Share

[Share on Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbest-payment-gateway-india%2F "Share on Facebook")[Share on Twitter](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbest-payment-gateway-india%2F&text=7%20Reasons%20Why%20Razorpay%20payment%20is%20Right%20for%20Your%20Business "Share on Twitter")[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbest-payment-gateway-india%2F "LinkedIn")[Email](mailto:?subject=7%20Reasons%20Why%20Razorpay%20payment%20is%20Right%20for%20Your%20Business&body=https%3A%2F%2Frazorpay.com%2Fblog%2Fbest-payment-gateway-india%2F "Email")

 Razorpay is an India’s all in one [payment solution](https://razorpay.com/). Accept, process, and disburse payments with ease. Access multiple payment modes, including cards, UPI, and [mobile wallets](https://razorpay.com/learn/mobile-wallet/). Scalable infrastructure to meet your growing demands. 
## Reasons why Razorpay payment may be the right choice for you:

### **1. Easily add payments to your website or app**

 Razorpay’s [Payment Gateway](https://razorpay.com/payment-gateway/) simplifies payments integration. Go live in minutes with our developer-friendly APIs, plugins, and libraries. Accept a wide range of payment modes, including cards, UPI, and [mobile wallets](https://razorpay.com/learn/mobile-wallet/). 

### **2. Access a wide range of payment solutions and services**

 Reduce costs, increase revenue, reduce churn, and enhance user experience simultaneously by adopting a subscriptions model. 
*   Razorpay’s Subscriptions supports automated recurring transactions on various payment modes, allowing you to onboard global subscribers and implement multiple billing models.
*   Additionally, for one-time scenarios like workshops or fundraising, you can simply create a [Razorpay Payment Link](https://razorpay.com/payment-links/) or [Payment Page](https://razorpay.com/payment-pages/), enabling easy payment acceptance in multiple currencies.

### **3. Target specific areas of your business based on data and insights**

Decision making is a crucial aspect of any business. And, data plays a huge role in this process since it enables you to form business contingency, as you can predict future trends and optimize your current efforts.Razorpay’s dashboard is the most comprehensive, data-driven, and an analytical dashboard that serves your purpose.The dashboard helps you evaluate real-time data and draw insights from the extensive reports, so you make better and informed business decisions.
**Related read: [What is a Payment Gateway and How Does It Work?](https://razorpay.com/blog/payment-gateway-101/)**

### **4. Manage and track money movements to vendors**

 Simplify your payments and financial operations with RazorpayX. No more manual labor, buggy software, or complex infra systems. Get instant payouts, save time, and provide a superior customer experience. With RazorpayX, you can make, control, track, and analyze all money movement in one unified platform. Manage payments to vendors, customers, and employees through the Financial CRM. Make informed business decisions with off-the-shelf analysis. _Say goodbye to traditional banking – choose RazorpayX!_
### **5. Provide the best support to your customers**

 Get top-notch [customer support with Razorpay.](https://razorpay.com/support/) We understand the importance of responsive service as your business grows. Our dedicated team is here to solve any payment-related setbacks for your customers, ensuring you can serve them better. No more waiting on hold – we provide lightning-fast solutions. Experience live support from real people, not bots. 
### **6. Expand your business globally for new revenue streams.**

 Expand your business globally with Razorpay’s[International Payment gateways](https://razorpay.com/international-payment-gateway-india/). Get state-of-the-art infrastructure supporting over 100 currencies for seamless transactions worldwide. Integrate the Payment Gateway easily or offer subscription plans with automated recurring transactions. Share payment links via various channels or create custom-branded Payment Pages. _Send GST-compliant invoices with item-level details and accept payments through multiple modes._
### **7. Get reliable fraud prevention and security**

 Your [online transactions](https://razorpay.com/learn/what-is-online-transaction/) deserve robust security. With [Payments Compliance](https://razorpay.com/learn/payment-compliance-secure-payments/), we ensure your sensitive information is safeguarded. Razorpay’s products are 100% [PCI DSS](https://razorpay.com/blog/what-is-pci-dss-compliance/) compliant and certified, meeting industry standards. Protect your hard-earned money and get started with Razorpay today! 

[Get Started With Razorpay](https://razorpay.com/)
